message:
fix(tui): rebuild tree after analyzer replacement to prevent index panic

Both `apply_background_reload` and `refresh_from_disk` replace
`self.analyzer` with a new Analyzer built from fresh issues, but
neither rebuilt `tree_flat_nodes`. The stale `issue_index` values
could point past the end of the new (possibly shorter) issue list,
causing an out-of-bounds panic at the unchecked array access in
`tree_list_render_text`.

Fix: call `rebuild_tree_if_active()` after both analyzer replacements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
